sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110138" key="fako/meli" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φᾰκό-μελι</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a <sense id="n110138.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compound of lentils and honey,</tr_> as a desiccative application, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.22</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φαβόμελι</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
